name: Iron and Mangowood Wire 2-Tier Fruit Basket Black - Threshold™: Traditional Round Produce Holder, Mango Wood & Iron
description:
Display your favorite fruits in style with the Iron and Wooden Wire 2-Tier Fruit Basket from Threshold™. Made from metal, this fruit basket features a two-tier design with one small and one large round fruit bowl, each designed with a wooden base to let you store an ample amount of fruits or vegetables. Featuring a mesh design, this two-tier fruit basket allows for air to naturally ripen and keep fruits fresh. In a black finish, it features a classic wired design that easily coordinates with a variety of decor styles.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
